criteria.name: AI-Powered Features
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes AI to provide personalized financial advice, automate tasks, and offer predictive analytics.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: The intuitiveness and ease of use of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Comprehensive Financial Management
criteria.description: The ability of the app to handle multiple financial tasks such as budgeting, expense tracking, investment management, and debt reduction.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The degree to which the app provides tailored advice and recommendations based on individual financial behaviors and goals.

criteria.name: Automation
criteria.description: The level of automation in tasks such as saving, investing, and expense tracking.
